content.fact: Picard is no longer Locutus, Riker returns from acting command, and Shelby remains a Borg-crisis specialist rather than permanent Enterprise crew.
content.injection: Inside The Best of Both Worlds, Part II, write Jean-Luc Picard, William Riker, Data with this season-local state and avoid replacing it with later outcomes.
